item.name: Get country, hosting, and pop-the-flow info

description.content: Public REST API for the Deezer music streaming service. Catalog endpoints (tracks, albums, artists, playlists, charts, genres, radios, editorial, search) are available unauthenticated; user-scoped endpoints require an OAuth 2.0 access token issued via the Deezer Connect flow.
